subcodes.title: Words to Julia Grundy spoken around Jan. 1905
subcodes.first_line: We must love all humanity as the children of God. Even if they kill us we must die with love for them.
subcodes.subjects: @four; five pathways of love, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @love of God, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
